name: team_task_create
description: Create a new structured task within the team's shared task system. Supports hierarchical task trees via parent_task_id, rich context sourcing from external integrations, dependency tracking between tasks, and priority-based scheduling. Use this to define work items that team members can collaboratively plan, compile, and execute.

title.description: Brief, descriptive title for the task

description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be accomplished, including acceptance criteria and scope

parent_task_id.description: ID of the parent task if this is a subtask. Creates a hierarchical task tree for complex work breakdown

priority.description: Task priority level used for scheduling and agent assignment

data.description: Source-specific data payload containing references or content

context_sources.description: Array of external context sources that provide background information for this task

dependencies.description: List of task IDs that must be completed before this task can begin execution

estimated_duration.description: Estimated time to complete (e.g., '30 minutes', '2 hours', '1 day')

deadline.description: Deadline for task completion in ISO 8601 format

metadata.description: Additional task-specific data, labels, or configuration

examples.name: Create a top-level task with context sources

parameters.title: Implement user authentication flow
parameters.description: Design and implement the OAuth 2.0 authentication flow including login, token refresh, and session management

parameters.title: Write unit tests for token refresh logic
parameters.description: Create comprehensive unit tests covering token expiry, refresh token rotation, and error handling
